description: Letter from a Byzantine silk dyer to the elder al-Najib Ezra in Fustat, detailing that the writer is afflicted by severe agony (al-ʿadhāb al-shadīd) after having been tortured and his children seized as a security. He had allegedly spoiled some previous silk garments, and asks Ezra al-Najib to help in reclaiming his children. (Information partly from Goitein’s index cards.) EMS. Verso also contains the draft of the beginning of a family letter in rudimentary handwriting, in which the writer defenes himself against his brother's rebukes. ASE.
description_he: מכתב מצבע משי ביזנטי לזקן אל-נג'יב עזרא בפוסטאט, המתאר ייסורים קשים לאחר שעונה וילדיו נתפסו כבטוחה בגין קלקול בגדי משי. מבקש עזרה בהחזרת ילדיו. בגב: טיוטת מכתב משפחתי.
